channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Here Are 10 Great Justice Scalia Quotes To Mark A Decade Since His Passing
item.description: Here are some of Justice Scalia's best moments in remembrance of the 10-year anniversary of his passing.

item.title: State Department links left-leaning nonprofits to Chinese propaganda
item.description: The State Department told Congress this week that left-leaning nonprofits Code Pink and the People's Forum are linked to Chinese influence operations.

item.title: 'The old world is gone': Rubio looks to reexamine relationship with allies at Munich conference
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio, who is attending the Munich Security Conference, could have an opportunity to clearly define Washington's relationship...

item.title: Mamdami Demands U.S. Immigration Policy Start Obeying Islam
item.description: Mamdani invoked Islamic doctrine to define civic obligation and delegitimize lawful, constitutional authority.

item.title: The Week: The Nancy Guthrie Disappearance
item.description: Plus: Trump rolls back climate regulations.

item.title: Republicans Will Keep Losing Until They Realize Power Isn’t Evil
item.description: We can exercise power, or we can allow our enemies to exercise it. Choose wisely.

item.title: Congress Has Always Held the Power over Tariffs
item.description: The House has finally rebuked President Trump over his unilateral trade war.

item.title: Turns Out The Irishman Detained By ICE Was Facing Drug Charges Back Home
item.description: The arrest of Irishman Seamus Culleton fueled a false media narrative that ICE is grabbing law-abiding people who have done nothing wrong.

item.title: Gen Z Is ‘Dumber’ Thanks To Adults Saturating Their Lives With Screens
item.description: Children can't be expected to dig deeper in an educational system engineered to keep them skimming.

item.title: 'Media tribalism and media bias': Trump's flurry of lawsuits changes the game for news outlets
item.description: President Trump has buried media outlets in an unprecedented avalanche of lawsuits alleging they defamed him and sullied his reputation, a move legal ...

item.title: Wuthering Lows: A Grossly Sexualized Brontë Adaptation
item.description: Emerald Fennell continues her soft-core feminism.

item.title: Eileen Gu’s Terrible Choice
item.description: Gu skis for China, a choice that is a little like deciding to represent a fascist country during the 1930s.

item.title: ‘Save China and Save America’: The Road Not Taken
item.description: A century-old correspondence portends the challenges the U.S. still faces in Asia.

item.title: Palestinian protester, detained for nearly a year, says 'inhumane' jail conditions prompted seizure
item.description: A Palestinian woman who has been held in an immigration jail for nearly a year after she attended a protest in New York City said she suffered a seizu...

item.title: Arizona GOP candidate drops out of primary, narrowing field to two
item.description: Housing developer Karrin Taylor Robson has suspended her campaign for Arizona governor, saying Thursday she doesn't want a divisive GOP primary that w...
